ddls:
CREATE TABLE "literary_works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literary work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the literary work */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the literary work */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the literary work */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the literary work */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text or excerpt of the literary work */,
  "inlinks" INTEGER /* Number of inlinks (references) to other works within the text */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number for identification */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the work */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the work */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the cover image */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the work */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the work has received */,
  "is_public_domain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the work is in the public domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literary_works_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_tournaments" (
  "work_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work-tournament association */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the work was used in the tournament */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the work in the tournament */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the work's usage in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_tournaments_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the work */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the work was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "is_main_character" INTEGER /* Indicates if the character is a main character */,
  "appearance_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the character appears in the work */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the character's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_points" (
  "plot_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot point */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work */,
  "plot_point" TEXT /* Summary of the plot point */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plot point */,
  "is_climax" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plot point is a climax */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Chapter number where the plot point occurs */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number where the plot point occurs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_points_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbolic_elements" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbolic element */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Summary of the symbolic element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the symbolic element */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the symbolic element recurs throughout the work */,
  "first_occurrence_chapter" INTEGER /* Chapter number of the first occurrence */,
  "last_occurrence_chapter" INTEGER /* Chapter number of the last occurrence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbolic_elements_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work relationship */,
  "source_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source literary work */,
  "target_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target literary work */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., inlink, reference) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the relationship */,
  "first_occurrence" TEXT /* Chapter or page number of the first occurrence of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_relationships_source_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_relationships_target_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)
